person_user.title: User (TalkBack / sighted)
person_user.summary: Launches the app, enables the accessibility service, and/or shares plain text containing URLs from other apps.

sys_linksnitch.title: LinkSnitch
sys_linksnitch.summary: Single Android applicationId `com.research.hci.linksnitch`, minSdk 26, Kotlin + Jetpack Compose + Material3. Two user-visible entry paths: launcher onboarding and Share sheet; one background path: accessibility focus on link text.
sys_linksnitch.containerOverview: Six logical layers in this diagram: launcher UI, share UI, `AccessibilityService`, pure-Kotlin URL pipeline (`UrlDetector`→`UrlAnalyzer`→`ExplanationGenerator`), TTS (`TtsService` / `TtsManager`), plus manifest/XML resources. No network calls in analysis code today; OkHttp is on classpath but unused in `UrlAnalyzer`.

ext_host_apps.title: Host apps
ext_host_apps.summary: Any app that can `ACTION_SEND` `text/plain` or expose link text in the view hierarchy for accessibility.

ext_android.title: Android framework
ext_android.summary: `AccessibilityService` callbacks, `Settings` / `Secure` for enabled services, `TextToSpeech`, `AudioManager` audio focus, `ToneGenerator`.

ctr_launcher_ui.title: Launcher UI
ctr_launcher_ui.summary: `MainActivity.kt` + `MainScreen.kt` + `LinkSnitchTheme` in `MainActivity.kt`. Checks whether `LinkSnitchAccessibilityService` is listed in `Settings.Secure.ENABLED_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICES`; opens `Settings.ACTION_ACCESSIBILITY_SETTINGS` when disabled.

ctr_share_ui.title: Share UI
ctr_share_ui.summary: `ShareActivity.kt`: translucent theme; reads `Intent.EXTRA_TEXT`, runs URL pipeline in `onCreate`, starts `TtsService` with `textToSpeak`, composes `AnalysisScreen`. `ShareViewModel.kt` duplicates the same pipeline in `analyzeUrlFromText` but is not used by `ShareActivity`.

ctr_accessibility.title: Accessibility service
ctr_accessibility.summary: `LinkSnitchAccessibilityService.kt`: only `TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUSED`; text from `source.text` or `contentDescription`; cancels prior `Handler` callback; 3000 ms delay then `ToneGenerator` on `STREAM_ACCESSIBILITY` + `TtsManager.speakWarning` (in-process, not `TtsService`).

ctr_tts.title: TTS
ctr_tts.summary: `TtsManager`: `TextToSpeech`, `Locale.US`, `AUDIOFOCUS_GAIN_TRANSIENT_MAY_DUCK` on `STREAM_MUSIC`, utterance IDs, `shutdown`. `TtsService`: starts speech from intent extra for Share path.

ctr_packaging.title: Manifest & resources
ctr_packaging.summary: `AndroidManifest.xml` registers activities and services; `res/xml/accessibility_service_config.xml` limits events to `typeViewAccessibilityFocused`, spoken feedback, `canRetrieveWindowContent`; `strings.xml` app label + service description; `accessibility_overlay.xml` exists but has **no references** in repo (orphan layout).

ln_act_main.title: MainActivity
ln_act_main.summary: `ComponentActivity`: `setContent { LinkSnitchTheme { Surface → MainScreen(...) } }`. Private `isAccessibilityServiceEnabled()` builds `packageName + '/' + LinkSnitchAccessibilityService` canonical name and scans `Settings.Secure.ENABLED_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICES`. Imports `ContextCompat` but does not use it.

ln_theme.title: LinkSnitchTheme
ln_theme.summary: `@Composable` wrapper: default `MaterialTheme` colorScheme + typography (no custom ColorScheme).

ln_main_screen.title: MainScreen
ln_main_screen.summary: Title LinkSnitch, instructions to share links, conditional red warning + Button to open accessibility settings when service disabled.

sh_activity.title: ShareActivity
sh_activity.summary: `EXTRA_TEXT` → `UrlDetector.findUrls().firstOrNull()` → `UrlAnalyzer.analyze` or Safe. Builds explanation: Suspicious → `ExplanationGenerator.generate` else literal safe string. Always `startService(Intent(TtsService).putExtra("textToSpeak", explanation))` before `setContent`.

sh_analysis_ui.title: AnalysisScreen
sh_analysis_ui.summary: `@Composable`: vertical gradient green vs amber, `Icons.Filled.CheckCircle` / `Warning`, Safe vs Warning title, body text, Done button calls `finish()`.

sh_viewmodel.title: ShareViewModel
sh_viewmodel.summary: `ViewModel` with `StateFlow<ShareUiState>`; `analyzeUrlFromText` mirrors detector+analyzer+generator. **Not referenced by ShareActivity** (dead integration path unless wired later).

ax_service.title: LinkSnitchAccessibilityService
ax_service.summary: `onServiceConnected`: constructs `TtsManager`, `ToneGenerator(STREAM_ACCESSIBILITY, 100)`. `onAccessibilityEvent`: ignores non-`TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUSED`; extracts text; first URL; analyzes; if Suspicious and non-null explanation, schedules `Handler.postDelayed` 3000 ms then beep + `speakWarning`. `onDestroy` removes callbacks, `ttsManager.shutdown()`, releases tone generator.

ax_handler.title: Debounce & delay
ax_handler.summary: `Handler(Looper.getMainLooper())` + `warningRunnable`; each new focus event cancels the previous pending runnable.

ax_tone.title: ToneGenerator earcon
ax_tone.summary: `TONE_PROP_BEEP` immediately before TTS in the delayed runnable.

dm_analyzer.title: UrlAnalyzer
dm_analyzer.summary: Prepends https if missing; `URI` host; heuristics order: punycode `xn--`+`IDN.toUnicode`, IPv4 regex, shortener suffix set, suspicious TLD set (substringAfterLast dot), keyword scan on full URL string, subdomain count > 4, brand whitelist vs `getRegisteredDomain` (last two labels). **Suspicious** only if any non-`SUSPICIOUS_KEYWORDS` finding exists (keywords alone → Safe). `OkHttpClient`/`Request` imported but unused.

dm_expl.title: ExplanationGenerator
dm_expl.summary: Brand mismatch / brand-in-path first; combines with IP/shortener in brand branch; else TLD, keyword, IP, shortener, punycode; **no spoken line for `EXCESSIVE_SUBDOMAINS` alone** (falls through to null). Prefixes output with LinkSnitch + colon.

dm_models.title: AnalysisResult & types
dm_models.summary: Sealed `Safe` vs `Suspicious(findings)`; `Finding` carries optional brand, registeredDomain, tld, keyword, decodedHost; `WarningType` enum lists all signal kinds.

tt_service.title: TtsService
tt_service.summary: `Service`: `onCreate` instantiates `TtsManager`; `onStartCommand` reads `textToSpeak` extra, calls `speakWarning`; `START_NOT_STICKY`; `onBind` returns null; `onDestroy` shuts down manager.

tt_manager.title: TtsManager
tt_manager.summary: `TextToSpeech` async init, `Locale.US`, pending text queue if speak before ready, `UtteranceProgressListener` abandons audio focus on done/error, `requestAudioFocus` on `STREAM_MUSIC` with `AUDIOFOCUS_GAIN_TRANSIENT_MAY_DUCK`.

pk_manifest.title: AndroidManifest.xml
pk_manifest.summary: Package `com.research.hci.linksnitch`; `MainActivity` launcher exported; `ShareActivity` exported translucent, `ACTION_SEND` `text/plain`; `TtsService` not exported; `LinkSnitchAccessibilityService` exported with `BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE`, meta-data points to `@xml/accessibility_service_config`.

pk_strings.title: strings.xml
pk_strings.summary: `app_name` LinkSnitch; long description for TalkBack users for the service.

pk_overlay.title: accessibility_overlay.xml
pk_overlay.summary: 1dp transparent `TextView`; **no references** in Kotlin or manifest in this repo (likely dead asset).

pk_gradle.title: build.gradle.kts
pk_gradle.summary: Compose BOM, Material3, OkHttp 4.12.0, `androidx.wear.compose:compose-foundation` (unusual for phone; verify necessity). compileSdk 34, minSdk 26.

cd_UrlAnalyzer.title: object UrlAnalyzer
cd_UrlAnalyzer.subtitle: Heuristics + gating rule
members: Finding list: PUNYCODE, IP_ADDRESS, URL_SHORTENER, SUSPICIOUS_TLD, SUSPICIOUS_KEYWORDS, EXCESSIVE_SUBDOMAINS, BRAND_MISMATCH/BRAND_IN_PATH
Return Suspicious iff non-keyword findings exist
getRegisteredDomain(host): last two dot labels (not PSL)

cd_Expl.title: object ExplanationGenerator
cd_Expl.subtitle: Template selection
members: Non-brand: TLD → keyword → IP → shortener → punycode

cd_A11y.title: class LinkSnitchAccessibilityService
cd_A11y.subtitle: : AccessibilityService()
members: onDestroy: removeCallbacks, shutdown TTS, release tone

cd_Share.title: class ShareActivity
cd_Share.subtitle: + AnalysisScreen composable
members: AnalysisScreen: gradient, Material icons, Done → finish()

cd_Tts.title: class TtsManager
cd_Tts.subtitle: TextToSpeech.OnInitListener
members: speakWarning: audio focus then speak with utterance id

cd_Models.title: AnalysisResult / Finding / WarningType
cd_Models.subtitle: Sealed + data + enum
members: Finding optional fields per signal type
